name: UBA : Mailbox Permission Added and Deleted in a Short Period of Time
notes: Detects mailbox permissions that are added and deleted within an hour.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Remove Mailbox Permission Succeeded match at least 1 times in 60 minutes after any of BB:UBA : Add Mailbox Permission Succeeded match with the same Account Name (custom)
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
when BB:UBA : Remove Mailbox Permission Succeeded match at least 1 times in 60 minutes after any of BB:UBA : Add Mailbox Permission Succeeded match with the same Account Name (custom)
thresholds: when BB:UBA : Remove Mailbox Permission Succeeded match at least 1 times in 60 minutes after any of BB:UBA : Add Mailbox Permission Succeeded match with the same Account Name (custom)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Mailbox Permission Added and Deleted in a Short Period of Time on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
AND when BB:UBA : Remove Mailbox Permission Succeeded match at least 1 times in 60 minutes after any of BB:UBA : Add Mailbox Permission Succeeded match with the same Account Name (custom)
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Mailbox Permission Added and Deleted in a Short Period of Time
